# projectUpdate

Updates a project.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`ProjectPayload`](../objects/project_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `input` | [`ProjectUpdateInput`](../input-objects/project_update_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | A partial project object to update the project with. |
